name: 2do-tools
description: Read, create, and complete tasks in the local 2Do macOS app.
long_description: A local MCP server for reading tasks from a read-only backup and creating or completing confirmed tasks through the 2Do macOS app.

tools.name: list_tasks_overdue
tools.description: List open tasks due before today.

tools.name: list_tasks_inbox
tools.description: List open tasks in the Inbox list.

tools.name: list_tasks_due_this_week
tools.description: List open tasks due during the current calendar week.

tools.name: list_tasks_completed_this_week
tools.description: List tasks completed during the current calendar week.

tools.name: open_task
tools.description: Open a 2Do task by UID using 2Do's macOS URL scheme.

tools.name: open_list
tools.description: Open a 2Do list by name using 2Do's macOS URL scheme.

tools.name: open_search
tools.description: Open a search in 2Do using 2Do's macOS URL scheme.

tools.name: open_task_quick_entry
tools.description: Open a pre-filled Quick Entry editor in 2Do without saving the task.

tools.name: create_task
tools.description: Create a 2Do task after explicit user confirmation.

tools.name: complete_task
tools.description: Complete one existing 2Do task after explicit user confirmation.

tools.name: refresh_backup_db
tools.description: Refresh the local read-only backup of the 2Do database.
